question: How do I start a new project?

response.answer:
To start a new project, the app inventory shows a global route:

- `/create-project` — `frontend/src/app/(main)/create-project/page.tsx`
- Feature registry entry: `route:/create-project` (`title: Create Project`, `module: main`, `status: route_discovered`)

What I checked:
- Artifact status: both sitemap and feature registry are current and available.
- Curated navigation help: `docs/help/articles/app-navigation-and-feature-map.md`
- Feature registry and sitemap for “create project” / “project setup”

What’s documented vs. what’s not:
- Documented help says project-scoped work uses routes with a project ID, but it does not document the project-creation flow itself.
- The `Create Project` route exists in implementation evidence, but it has no curated help article linked yet.
- So I can confirm the route, but not the full user-facing behavior or required fields from curated docs alone.

If you want, I can also inspect the `/create-project` page source to give you implementation-backed details on what the form actually asks for.
